== Notes for [[Item:Q107366|Q107366]] ==

Harb ibn Umayya
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Harb ibn Umayya was among the Sahaba's ancestors. Harb means "war".

His father was Umayya ibn Abd Shams [1]

He was the father of Harith ibn Harb and Abu Sufyan ibn Harb [2].

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:4410719680960024502

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
